step_title: trusted system broadcast group_context ingestion repair
summary: 仅在 message_protocol_mapper.py 补齐 extensions.author_kind 与 extensions.context_block/group_context 的 server 侧 canonical ingestion，避免 trusted system/group_context payload 被错误降成普通 message.posted，并恢复 group_context 进入 server 持久化/广播语义链。
blocker: canonical proof: formal top-level + extensions nested + extensions.custom nested all preserve author_kind=system and context_block.group_context after normalize_message_to_canonical_v2
